docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF VAZQUEZ, PAOLA AS TO DEFENDANT SMITH, MIKE , AN INDIVIDUAL JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
